And she’s coming to Downtown Bellefontaine on Thursday, November 16th, to perform at the Holland Theatre.

What sets Frey apart is not just her impressive rodeo pedigree but also her unapologetic sincerity. In an industry sometimes accused of chasing trends, Kylie Frey stands out as a refreshing voice, too real to dismiss even for those who claim to be ardent country haters. Her music captures the essence of genuine storytelling, reflecting the highs and lows of real-life experiences.

Make sure to get your tickets now… while you still can!

Accompanying Frey on bass is the talented local musician Jesse Jervis, adding another layer of authenticity to the performances. Jervis, deeply rooted in the local music scene, complements Frey's sound, displaying a synergy that resonates with audiences far and wide.

Adding to the excitement of Kylie Frey's performance is the opening act by Ohio native singer-songwriter Brandi Sparks. Hailing from the heartland, Sparks brings her own unique perspective to the stage, infusing the night with a blend of country charm and Midwestern grit. As a rising star in her own right, Sparks sets the stage for an unforgettable evening of music.

For country music enthusiasts, this is an event not to be missed. Kylie Frey's music not only typifies the genre but also transcends it, creating a sonic experience that resonates with the soul. It's a chance to witness the convergence of tradition and modernity, as Frey's music bridges the gap between the timeless roots of country and the contemporary sounds of today.

As Frey takes the stage, clad in her signature blue jeans, the audience is in for a treat that goes beyond the typical country music spectacle.

It's a journey into the heart of America, where the rodeo arena meets the honky-tonk stage, and genuine stories unfold through the twang of guitars and the rich timbre of Frey's voice.

In an environment that often craves validity, Kylie Frey delivers. Her music is not just a sound; it's a genuine expression of life, love, and the rugged beauty of the American South. So, grab your cowboy boots and head down to experience an evening of true country magic, where Kylie Frey, Jesse Jervis, and Brandi Sparks come together to create memories that will linger long after the last chord fades away. Mark your calendars: Kylie Frey and guests perform on Thursday, November 16th, at 7:30 pm. Click here for tickets!

item.title: Small Business Saturday is Coming
item.dc:creator: admin_nexa
item.content:encoded:
Are you prepared for the much-anticipated Small Business Saturday, a delightful event set to take place on Saturday, November 25th, throughout the charming streets of Downtown Bellefontaine? The festive season is upon us, and this is the perfect time to immerse yourself in the joyous spirit of community and local commerce. We guarantee it's an occasion you don’t want to miss!

About Small Business Saturday

For a little backstory, in 2010, American Express birthed Small Business Saturday with a vision to cultivate both a local shopping and social experience. As the calendar flips to Saturday, November 25th, you're not just stepping into a day of incredible deals, but also a chance to escape the overwhelming hustle and bustle often associated with major city shopping. Better yet, it's an opportunity to connect with family and friends while actively contributing to the vitality of your community.

As many of you already know, Downtown Bellefontaine pulsates with life thanks to its small businesses, the heartbeat of our beautiful city. Boutiques like Nest 1896, Four Acre Clothing Co., and The Olde Mint Antiques, alongside delectable dining spots such as Six Hundred Downtown, Brewfontaine, and The Syndicate, collectively create the unique essence of our beloved city. These establishments transform Bellefontaine, Ohio, into a home, a destination that's truly worth living in or visiting—especially around the holiday season.

It's paramount to recognize and acknowledge the invaluable role these businesses play in shaping our community. Your appreciation and support, especially during events like Small Business Saturday, become gifts that keep on giving. Small businesses, after all, are the lifeblood of our community, contributing to its vibrancy and distinct charm. Your assistance is crucial for their sustained growth and continued presence.

Why Small Business Saturday Matters

The beauty of Small Business Saturday lies not just in the splendid offerings of each establishment but in its accessibility to everyone. You can make a difference with a single purchase, and while the option to indulge in more than one is not just encouraged but welcomed, the simplicity of contributing to this event is noteworthy. Every business in Downtown Bellefontaine is gearing up to offer enticing deals and savings, ensuring that your shopping experience is not only enjoyable but also budget-friendly.

As Christmas approaches, Saturday, November 25th, presents an opportune moment to make a significant dent in your gift list. Or, perhaps you wish to indulge in a little self-care shopping? Treat yourself to the delights readily available at Rustic Boutique, PeachTree Boutique, or Just U’NeeQ.

Remember, Small Business Saturday isn't just a title; it's a testament to the immense offerings our community provides. From fashionable apparel to delightful toys from The Fun Company, and vintage antiques to mouthwatering sweets on display at Queen of Hearts Fine Chocolates & Gifts, the diversity of options makes shopping in Downtown Bellefontaine a truly convenient and enjoyable experience.

The best part? You can officially bid farewell to the stress and chaos of typical holiday shopping—no more jostling in crowds, enduring long lines, or braving the cold weather. Small Business Saturday is your alternative, offering substantial savings without the usual hassle. By participating, you're not just availing fantastic merchandise; you're also making a substantial contribution to the welfare of your community.

Don’t Miss Small Business Saturday We hope to see each and every one of you out and about in Downtown Bellefontaine on Saturday, November 25th, for the celebration of Small Business Saturday!

item.title: Why Small Business Saturday Matters
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
In the bustling world of commerce dominated by big-box retailers and e-commerce giants, there's a hidden gem that shines brightly each year: Small Business Saturday. This special day, Saturday, November 25th, nestled between Black Friday and Cyber Monday, encourages consumers to shift their focus from the retail behemoths to the heartbeat of their communities—specifically, local small businesses in Downtown Bellefontaine.  

Below, we explore the significance of Small Business Saturday and unveil the myriad reasons why supporting these local enterprises is not just an annual event but a lifestyle choice that fosters thriving communities. 

The Benefits of Small Business Saturday 

First and foremost, Small Business Saturday serves as a powerful reminder of the unique character and charm that small businesses infuse into our neighborhoods. Unlike chain stores that often sport a uniform look and feel, local businesses offer a diverse range of products and services, each reflecting the passion and personality of the entrepreneurs behind them. Whether it's a delicious candy store, such as Queen of Hearts Fine Chocolates & Gifts, or a quaint coffee shop, like Sweet Aromas Coffee, crafting beverages with love, these establishments contribute to the cultural richness of our communities. 

Beyond aesthetics, the economic impact of supporting small businesses cannot be overstated. Local businesses are significant job creators, employing individuals who live and invest in the same community. When you choose to shop small, you are directly contributing to the local job market, helping your neighbors sustain and improve their quality of life. This ripple effect extends further, as these employees, in turn, become consumers, supporting other local businesses and fostering a cycle of economic growth within the community. 

Moreover, Small Business Saturday provides a lifeline for many small businesses that face the daunting challenge of competing with corporate giants. The financial support garnered on this day can make a substantial difference in the survival and success of these enterprises. By choosing to spend your hard-earned dollars at a locally owned shop or restaurant, you become an essential part of the community's economic ecosystem, ensuring that the economic benefits stay within the locality rather than being siphoned off to distant corporate headquarters. 

In an era where personal connections can sometimes be overshadowed by the convenience of online shopping, Small Business Saturday offers a chance to rekindle the human touch in commerce. Small businesses thrive on relationships, and the personalized service they provide is unparalleled. Owners often know their customers by name, take the time to understand their preferences, and go the extra mile to ensure satisfaction. This level of customer care not only enhances the shopping experience but fosters a sense of belonging and community that is increasingly rare in today's fast-paced world. 

This Year, Commit to Small Business Saturday 

Remember, Small Business Saturday is not just a one-day event but a celebration of the values that bind communities together. By choosing to support local businesses in Downtown Bellefontaine, you champion diversity, create jobs, bolster the economy, nurture personal connections, and contribute to the overall sustainability of your community.  

So, this year and every year, let's make a conscious choice to embrace the heart of our communities by shopping small and savoring the unique flavors and colors that local businesses bring to our lives.

item.title: Santa Claus Is Coming to (Down)Town!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
The most enchanting time of the year is upon us, and Downtown Bellefontaine is gearing up for the spectacular event that will kick off the holiday season in style. Get ready to be dazzled by the twinkling lights, festive floats, and the jolly presence of Santa Claus himself at the First Fridays Bellefontaine annual Hometown Christmas Parade on Friday, December 8th. It will be a night of joy and wonder that promises to create cherished memories for you and your loved ones.

About the Hometown Christmas Parade

The magic begins at 4:00 PM on Friday, December 8th,  with pre-parade festivities, all designed to set the cheerful tone for the evening, giving attendees the chance to immerse themselves in the holiday spirit well before the main event begins.

Special note: Before the parade commences, head over to Four Acre Clothing Co. to pick up a glow stick.  

Start your adventure by stopping by the Main Street Marketplace to grab your complimentary activities passport. Until 8 PM (or while supplies last), kiddos can write a letter to Santa Claus at Richwood Bank, craft an ornament at Homegrown Yoga Downtown, decorate a cookie at Relax Nail Bar & Salon, savor hot chocolate from Sweet Aromas Coffee, create reindeer food with Aurora Wealth Advisors, snag a cookie from City Sweets & Creamery, get a temporary tattoo from Fathom Reality, and take a ride on grandpa’s train!

The streets will come alive with laughter, excitement, and the scent of delicious treats from the food trucks lining the area, including Freyhof’s Funnel Cakes, The Flying Pepper, R Smokehouse, Pig in the Pickle, Fork in the Road, Hall’s Country Kettle Corn, Where There’s Smoke, and Cloudy Days Home of The Specialty Cotton Candy. It’s safe to say that whether you're craving a sweet or savory snack, there's something for every palate to enjoy. This is the perfect way to warm up on a chilly December evening and add to the jolly spirit that permeates the air.

As the clock strikes 6:00 PM, the parade will depart from the fairgrounds, making its journey downtown. We recommend arriving early to secure your ideal viewing spot along the parade route. The atmosphere will be electrifying, with the anticipation of Santa's grand entrance building as the parade progresses.

But the fun won’t end with the parade!

Following the parade, make sure to swing by The Photo Booth to get a photo with Santa himself! After all, the holiday season wouldn't be complete without a picture with the big man in red, and Downtown Bellefontaine wants to make sure this holiday season is an unforgettable experience for everyone.

So, mark your calendars, gather your loved ones, and join us for an evening filled with magic on Friday, December 8th, at 4 PM. Presented by Citizens Federal Savings and Loan Association, the Hometown Christmas Parade is a celebration of joy, wonder, and community spirit—a night guaranteed to leave you with heartwarming memories that will last a lifetime. Don't miss out on this festive extravaganza that brings the holiday spirit to life in the heart of Downtown Bellefontaine! We look forward to seeing you all there!

item.title: Darin and Brooke: A Musical Journey of Triple-Threat Talents
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
In the vast landscape of music, where genres blend and artists strive for uniqueness, few shine as brightly as the husband-and-wife duo, Darin and Brooke Aldridge. Armed with the proverbial triple threat of uniquely distinctive singing, commanding instrumental skills, and accomplished songwriting, this award-winning Americana/Country/Bluegrass pair continues to ascend to new heights in the industry while maintaining their easy-going, down-to-earth connection with audiences everywhere… including Downtown Bellefontaine!

That’s right: Darin and Brooke Aldridge are coming to The Holland Theatre on Saturday, January 27th! Get tickets here.

One Great Duo, One Amazing Night

Darin and Brooke have not only captured the hearts of their fans but have also left an indelible mark on the legendary stage of the Grand Ole Opry, gracing it more than 50 times. This accomplishment speaks volumes about the duo's prowess and the widespread appeal of their music. It's a testament to their talent and the universal resonance of their craft.

The musical journey of Darin and Brooke is a fascinating exploration of diverse influences and a harmonious blend of genres. Rooted in gospel traditions, their music transcends boundaries, seamlessly weaving elements of Americana, Country, and Bluegrass. This versatility has allowed them to tour the world, captivating audiences with a sound that is both timeless and contemporary.

At the core of their success is Darin and Brooke's distinctive singing, a vocal prowess that can only be described as a force of nature. Brooke's soulful and emotive delivery complements Darin's rich and resonant voice, creating a harmonious balance that is the hallmark of their sound. Whether it's a ballad or an upbeat Bluegrass tune, their voices intertwine, creating a musical tapestry that resonates with authenticity.

Commanding instrumental skills further elevates Darin and Brooke's musicality. Both accomplished musicians in their own right, Darin's mastery of various instruments, including guitar and banjo, blends seamlessly with Brooke's skillful handling of the mandolin. The synergy between their instruments adds layers of complexity to their performances, showcasing a depth of skill that sets them apart in the crowded musical landscape.

Songwriting is the third pillar of their triple-threat talents. Darin and Brooke's ability to craft poignant and relatable lyrics adds depth to their music. Each song tells a story, drawing the audience into a narrative that is both personal and universal. Their songwriting prowess has earned them critical acclaim and numerous awards, solidifying their position as not just performers but also storytellers with a unique ability to connect with listeners on a profound level.

What sets Darin and Brooke apart is not just their musical prowess but also their genuine connection with their audience. Despite their numerous accolades and global tours, the duo remains grounded and approachable. Their down-to-earth demeanor creates an intimate atmosphere at their live performances, making each audience member feel like a part of their musical journey.

Get Tickets Now!

Darin and Brooke's music serves as a reminder that, at its core, great music is not just about notes and chords but about the stories it tells and the emotions it evokes. To see this duo live at The Holland Theatre in Downtown Bellefontaine on Saturday, January 27th, click here to secure tickets.

*Please note that all ticket sales are final—no refunds or exchanges.

item.title: Max Razinger's Solo Spectacle: A Musical Feast at Brewfontaine
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
In the heart of local music scenes, there are often hidden gems waiting to be discovered. Max Razinger, half of the brother/sister duo SaMax, is one such gem, and he's bringing his musical magic to Brewfontaine in Downtown Bellefontaine for a special solo performance on Sunday, January 28th, that promises to be nothing short of extraordinary.

Known as a local favorite, Max Razinger has been making waves with SaMax, the dynamic brother/sister duo celebrated for their genre-blending sound and captivating performances. Now, Max is stepping into the spotlight for a solo show at Brewfontaine, offering patrons a unique opportunity to experience his musical prowess in an intimate setting.

Brewfontaine, a popular local haunt, provides the perfect backdrop for Max's solo spectacle. The cozy ambiance, combined with the allure of craft brews, sets the stage for an evening of musical delight. So, gather your friends, head over to Brewfontaine, and prepare for a night that promises not only exceptional music but also the warmth of community and the joy of shared experiences.

The beauty of Max Razinger's solo performance lies in its diversity. As a seasoned musician with a passion for exploring different genres, Max will be treating the audience to a repertoire of covers that span a wide musical spectrum. From classic rock anthems to soulful ballads, and everything in between, there's something for everyone. Max's ability to seamlessly navigate through genres ensures that each listener will find a musical moment to savor.

For those attending the event, the organizers suggest bringing ponchos—a playful nod to the unexpected. Max Razinger is known for his ability to surprise and delight audiences, and the mention of "Purple Rain" hints at the possibility of an impromptu Prince cover. The prospect of getting "Purple Rained on" adds an element of excitement, encouraging attendees to embrace the unpredictable nature of live music and create memories that linger long after the last note fades away.

What makes Max Razinger's solo performance truly special is the chance to witness a musician step out of the ensemble setting and showcase their individual artistry. It's an intimate encounter with the soul of the artist, where every strum of the guitar, every note sung, and every expression shared becomes a personal connection between performer and audience.

Beyond the music, Max Razinger's solo show at Brewfontaine is a celebration of local talent and the vibrant community that supports it. In an era where live performances have a unique significance, this event offers a chance to revel in the magic of shared moments, good company, and, of course, great music.

So, mark your calendars, call up your friends, and head to Brewfontaine on Sunday, January 28th, at 5 PM for an evening that promises to be a musical feast for the senses. Max Razinger's solo performance is not just about the covers and the craft brews – it's about creating memories, forging connections, and celebrating the rich tapestry of local talent that makes our communities come alive with the sound of music.

item.title: A New Leaf Florist Welcomes New Ownership and Exciting Changes
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
February 9, 2024 - A New Leaf Florist, a cherished flower shop in downtown Bellefontaine, is thrilled to announce a change in ownership and an exciting period of transformation. The shop, deeply rooted in the community, has been a staple for floral needs for over 25 years. The new ownership, as of the beginning of the year, brings fresh energy and a commitment to upholding the shop's legacy while introducing innovative changes.

New owner, Bo Ramsey, stopped into the business one day to purchase flowers for his wife, Jennifer. Having other businesses that are seasonal in nature and looking for something to do in the wintertime, Bo asked if they needed a delivery driver and started delivering flowers. After learning the business was looking to sell, Bo and Jennifer decided to take it on.

“I brought in Jennifer to see how it all runs, check out some numbers, and made an offer,” Bo said. “They had offers from bigger florists, but they wanted to see it go to somebody local, somebody that has passion and is going to carry it on like she did.”

The upcoming months will see a gradual shift in management ensuring a seamless transition for customers. Bridget Helmlinger will be assuming the role as general manager.

Exciting plans are in store for A New Leaf Florist, with a complete renovation on the horizon. The makeover will encompass new flooring, paint, lighting, and an eye-catching new awning for the exterior. Additionally, the shop has acquired a new Sprinter van to enhance delivery services. A New Leaf Florist will remain a hub for beautiful, thoughtfully crafted floral arrangements, and the new ownership looks forward to adding their unique touch to the shop's offerings.

Scott Green, the lead designer with over 30 years of experience, will continue to play a key role in crafting elegant flower arrangements. The owners are enthusiastic about maintaining the high quality and unique offerings that have made A New Leaf Florist a beloved establishment in downtown Bellefontaine.

“The quality of all the floral arrangements is going to be the same because Scott's still here,” said Jennifer. “The only real changes you're going to see are the inside cosmetic changes. We're also going to carry some different lines and bring in unique products not sold anywhere else in the downtown.”

Reflecting on the transition, the Ramseys express gratitude for the warm welcome from the community. The decision to sell to local owners with a shared passion for the business was a deliberate choice, ensuring that the shop continues to thrive in the hands of those who understand and appreciate its significance. The community is invited to visit A New Leaf Florist at 111 N. Main St. and experience the exciting changes firsthand. To learn more or order, visit their website at anewleaffloristinc.com.

item.title: Hop Into Fun: Easter Egg-Stravaganza 2024
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Spring is in the air, and with it comes the much-anticipated Easter Egg-Stravaganza presented by Prescription Bliss! Get ready for a day filled with laughter, creativity, and delightful surprises that will leave a lasting smile on your face.

This year's event in Downtown Bellefontaine guarantees that every member of the family, from the little ones to the young at heart, has an egg-straordinary time.

Free Festivities Across Town

Downtown Bellefontaine will be buzzing with excitement as free activities are sprinkled throughout! Engage your artistic side with a bit of arts and crafts, embark on a thrilling scavenger hunt that will take you on an adventure around town, and unwind with a family-friendly movie screening at the Holland.

Elevate the Excitement with a Passport!

For those looking to add a touch of magic to their Easter experience, the presale passports on Eventbrite are your golden ticket! Priced at just $10.00, these passports come loaded with goodies, including a sling bag filled with surprises.

Dive into the world of creativity with a pass for slime egg coloring at The Fun Company, an art activity at Prescription Bliss, cookie decorating with City Sweets & Creamery in the Main St Marketplace, and cap off the evening with a glowing easter egg hunt at Putt and Play. Don't miss out on this eggstra-special upgrade to make your Easter Eggstravaganza truly unforgettable!

Celebrating 10 Years with Community Health and Wellness

This year marks a special milestone for Community Health and Wellness, and they are pulling out all the stops to celebrate a decade of health and happiness! Join in the festivities with FREE activities and opportunities to win fantastic prizes for both kids and adults. It's a double celebration that adds even more joy to an already spectacular event.

Capture the Magic: Photos with the Easter Bunny

No Easter celebration is complete without a photo op with the guest of honor—the Easter Bunny! The Photo Booth will be on hand to capture those precious moments. Secure your spot by purchasing tickets online for $20 or at the door for $25. Don't miss this chance to create lasting memories with the whole family. Schedule your photo session with the Easter Bunny through The Photo Booth using this link.

Event Details: Downtown Bellefontaine at 4:00 PM

Mark your calendars for the Easter Eggstravaganza kick-off at 4:00 PM in Downtown Bellefontaine. Gather the family, and head over to The Chamber office to pick up your passport and any ticketed purchases. The town will be alive with the spirit of Easter, and there's no better way to spend the day than by immersing yourself in the festivities with loved ones.

So, get ready to hop into an Easter adventure like never before! The Easter Egg-Stravaganza promises a day of joy, creativity, and community spirit that will have everyone talking long after the event concludes. Whether you're enjoying the free activities scattered throughout town or opting for the passport experience, this celebration is designed to bring smiles and laughter to all. Don't miss out on the magic—join us for an egg-citing day in Bellefontaine!

item.title: Downtown Bellefontaine’s 1st Annual Brews & Blarney Crawl
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Get ready for a St. Patrick’s Day celebration like no other! Downtown Bellefontaine is proud to present its first-ever Brews & Blarney Crawl, generously sponsored by the fantastic team at Zimmkat Design Company. This event is not just about sipping beers; it's a lively adventure filled with fun, laughter, and the spirit of the Irish.

St. Patrick’s Day Trivia

Dive into the magic of St. Patrick's Day with these delightful Irish trivia nuggets! Did you know the color originally associated with St. Patrick was blue, not green? Green became popular due to Ireland's lush landscapes. Also, the world's shortest St. Patrick's Day parade is just 98 feet long, fittingly in the Irish village of Dripsey. And if you're feeling fancy, join the elite Order of the Red Hand—a prestigious group of knights founded in 1393 to protect Irish nobility. Now, armed with these trivia treasures, you're ready to celebrate St. Patty's Day in style!

Save the Date: Saturday, March 16
Time to Shine: 6 PM - 12 AM

The festivities commence at 6 PM, where you'll have the opportunity to sample an array of local brews, each one representing the finest flavors of Bellefontaine. But this isn't your typical beer crawl. Brace yourself for a journey through downtown that goes beyond pints. Engage in lively activities, face entertaining challenges, and participate in games designed to surprise you at every corner.

Picture yourself strolling down the charming streets, surrounded by the camaraderie of fellow revelers, the sounds of laughter echoing through the air. Imagine stumbling upon unexpected activities that test your wit and charm, creating memories that will be the envy of every leprechaun in town.

As the night progresses, the excitement doesn't wane—it crescendos! At 9 PM, head over to The Syndicate for the official after-party. The night will come alive with green spirits, live music, dancing, and a touch of malarkey, ensuring the perfect climax to an extraordinary evening of revelry.

But hold on to your leprechaun hats because there's more to come! Consider this just a taste of the excitement we have in store for you. Stay tuned for announcements about exclusive brews, details about special guests, and additional activities that will make Downtown Bellefontaine’s Brews & Blarney Crawl a night to remember. Keep your eyes peeled for updates and surprises that will elevate this event to legendary status.

Tickets & Information! 

Unlock a world of excitement with our Brews & Blarney Crawl ticket options! For the solo adventurer, the Single Ticket at $30 is your gateway to a night of fun. Want to share the experience? Grab a Pair of Tickets for $50 and bring a friend along, saving some green in the process! 

Your ticket includes an Exclusive Event T-Shirt, admission to The Syndicate's After Party with live music and a "magical shot," 5 Golden Dollar Coins for brews, a Special Gift Bag from Zimmkat Design Company, an Official Event Sticker, a Prize Drawing Ticket for fantastic giveaways, and exclusive games and activities. Don't miss this unforgettable night of blarney and beer!

So, mark your calendars, dust off your favorite green attire, and get ready to join the merriment. Let’s turn Downtown Bellefontaine into a sea of laughter, cheers, and unforgettable moments. This St. Patrick’s Day, be part of history as we kick off the 1st Annual Brews & Blarney Crawl—an adventure you won’t want to miss!

item.title: Lúnasa Returns to Downtown Bellefontaine
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Get ready to be swept off your feet as the best Irish band in the world is making a triumphant return to the Holland Theatre! Lúnasa, renowned for their intricate arrangements and distinctive sound, has been redefining the boundaries of traditional Irish music, captivating audiences across the globe. Since their inception, Lúnasa has garnered critical acclaim and left an indelible mark on the world of acoustic music.

From the very beginning, Lúnasa set out to push the limits of traditional Irish music. Their complex arrangements and unique approach to sound have not only energized audiences but have also earned them a special place in the hearts of music enthusiasts worldwide. Lúnasa's innovative style breathes new life into traditional tunes, creating an experience that is both authentic and refreshing.

The Irish Echo, known for its discerning taste in Irish music, has showered Lúnasa with praise, hailing them as "the hottest Irish acoustic band on the planet." This accolade is no small feat, considering the rich tapestry of talent that the Irish music scene boasts. Lúnasa's ability to infuse passion, precision, and creativity into their performances has elevated them to a status of excellence that few can rival.

But it's not just the critics who have fallen under the spell of Lúnasa's enchanting music. Billboard, a powerhouse in the music industry, couldn't help but sing their praises, declaring that "anybody who listens can't help but find them contagious." This infectious quality speaks volumes about the band's ability to connect with listeners on a visceral level. Lúnasa doesn't just play music; they create an immersive experience that transcends boundaries and resonates with people from all walks of life.

As Lúnasa gears up for their performance at The Holland in Downtown Bellefontaine, anticipation is building among fans and newcomers alike. Their live shows are legendary, blending virtuosity with a down-to-earth energy that makes each performance feel like an intimate gathering. Whether you're a die-hard fan or someone discovering their magic for the first time, attending a Lúnasa concert is a journey into the heart of Irish music.

What sets Lúnasa apart is not just their technical prowess but also their commitment to preserving the essence of Irish musical traditions. While they push the envelope with modern influences, they remain grounded in the rich heritage of their musical roots. This fusion of old and new creates a musical experience that is both timeless and contemporary, ensuring that Lúnasa's appeal transcends generations.

So, if you find yourself in Downtown Bellefontaine on Tuesday, March 5th, the night of Lúnasa's performance, consider it an invitation to embark on a musical adventure. Prepare to be transported to the heart of Ireland, where the notes of the fiddle, flute, whistle, guitar, and percussion come together in perfect harmony. Lúnasa's return to the Holland promises not just a concert but an immersive celebration of Irish music and culture.

To secure tickets to Lúnasa at the Holland on Tuesday, March 5th, starting at 7:30 PM, click here! Please note that all sales are final and no refunds or exchanges will be permitted.

item.title: St. Patrick's Day Takes Over Downtown Bellefontaine
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Downtown Bellefontaine is gearing up for an unforgettable St. Patrick's Day weekend, with a plethora of festivities that promise to enchant and entertain. Let's dive into the vibrant events awaiting you in the heart of the city:

1. Downtown Bellefontaine Partnership 1st Annual Brews & Blarney Crawl

Embark on a journey like never before at the inaugural Brews & Blarney Crawl hosted by the Downtown Bellefontaine Partnership. Scheduled for Saturday, this St. Patrick's Day adventure kicks off in the early evening, promising a delightful fusion of local brews, engaging activities, challenges, and surprises at every turn. Secure your spot and partake in the revelry by grabbing your tickets here.

2. Brews and Blarney Crawl After Party at The Syndicate!

As the crawl concludes, the merriment continues at 9:00 PM at The Syndicate on Saturday evening. The official after-party transforms the night into a spectacle of green spirits, live music, dancing, and an abundance of malarkey. The energy is infectious, and the best part? There's no cover charge – everyone is invited to join the celebration and revel in the joyous atmosphere!

3. St. Patrick's Day Party at Roundhouse Depot Brewing Co.

On Saturday, Roundhouse Depot Brewing Co. invites you to immerse yourself in an epic celebration of St. Patrick's Day shenanigans. The party, starting at noon, includes not only the brewing of two special beers for the occasion but also the delectable offerings from Schmidt's Sausage Food Truck serving from 3-8 PM. Picture yourself surrounded by the aroma of craft beer, delicious bites, and the contagious spirit of celebration.

4. Saint Patrick's Day Weekend at Brewfontaine

At Brewfontaine, the luck of the Irish extends throughout the entire weekend! Delight in ice-cold green pints of Duke's Leprechaun Light, savor Lucky Charms shots, indulge in St. Paddy's themed cocktails, and treat your taste buds to delectable corned beef hash. The revelry reaches its peak with the Saturday bar crawl – a perfect opportunity to immerse yourself in the vibrant atmosphere of camaraderie.

5. Leslie Mendelson at the Holland Theatre

For those seeking a different St. Patrick's Day experience, head to the Holland Theatre on Saturday to witness Leslie Mendelson's enchanting performance at 7:30 PM. Described by Relix Magazine as an artist with a loyal, cross-generational audience, Leslie's musicality cuts across the realms of time, drawing inspiration from 1970s songwriters like Carole King and Carly Simon. Secure your tickets for an evening of musical magic here.

Don your most vibrant green attire, gather your friends, and immerse yourself in the kaleidoscope of St. Patrick's Day festivities taking over downtown Bellefontaine. It's a weekend filled with merriment, music, and memories just waiting to be made!

item.title: Treat Yourself to the Irresistible Flavors of 2G’s Barbecue in Downtown Bellefontaine
item.dc:creator: admin_nexa
item.content:encoded:
If you find yourself seeking an authentic, local, slow-cooked barbecue experience, look no further than 2G’s Barbecue, located at 116 North Main in Downtown Bellefontaine. Slow cooked brisket, colossal one pound loaded baked potatoes, and all-you-can-eat fish every Friday are just a few of the reasons this restaurant is one of the most popular in the area. Reviews and customers rave about the food, but it’s the family friendly environment and small-town hospitality that puts this restaurant above the rest.

At the heart of 2G’s Barbecue is how its founders set out on a dream after facing adversity, as narrated by the dynamic duo behind the establishment—George and Vanessa Hunter. Their journey to culinary success was paved with challenges, and George, in a candid reflection, shares the transformative power of faith and perseverance. Overcoming personal obstacles, he found solace in a loving savior, God, who not only brought hope into his life but also paved the way for the realization of his dreams.

In George’s own words, "I know first-hand what it feels like to be hopeless. Obstacles and difficulties, most of my own making, drove me to find hope in God." The acknowledgment of divine intervention and the unwavering support of the local community culminated in the birth of 2G’s Barbecue—a testament to the belief that, with faith, nothing is impossible.  These values are at the core of the companies mission, treat others with love, respect and kindness.

Beyond the flavorful dishes, 2G’s Barbecue distinguishes itself with a commitment to personalized service. The 2G’s family endeavors to make each visit a memorable experience, ensuring that patrons feel a genuine connection not commonly found in other establishments. It's a place where you're not just a customer; you're part of the 2G’s family.

Now, let’s talk about the star of the show: the menu. Bone-in smoky ribs, savory wings, and mouthwatering pulled pork sandwiches with a host of delicious side options that include house made mac and cheese, collard greens and fresh baked cornbread too.  And if you’re in the mood for something a bit different, why not try their seafood options? From shrimp and frog legs to catfish, 2G’s caters to all tastes.

For those looking to share an appetizer, indulge in the loaded fries, generously covered with pulled pork, or the nachos made with Doritos, pulled pork, and an original sauce. It's a feast for the senses that showcases the culinary creativity and dedication of the 2G’s team.

Of course, save room for dessert because 2G’s Barbecue doesn’t disappoint. Treat yourself to George’s Banana Pudding or savor a slice of pie—whether it's peach, cherry, apple, or black raspberry, each bite is a sweet symphony that concludes your culinary journey on a delightful note.

Yet, 2G’s Barbecue isn’t just about the food, it's about inspiration and spreading positivity. George and Vanessa aim to share their story and create an environment where every visitor feels the love of God and leaves encouraged, knowing that, despite life’s challenges, dreams can always come true.

In short, your journey to 2G’s is not just about filling your stomach—it’s about nourishing your soul. Stop in and see for yourself!

You can learn more about 2G’s by visiting their website at: https://www.2gsbarbecue.com/

Please note that 2G’s Barbecue takes a break on Sundays and Mondays. Stay connected and stay informed about the latest happenings by following 2G’s on Facebook.

item.title: National Burrito Day: Celebrate with Flavor at The Flying Pepper Cantina
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Get ready to mark your calendars and tantalize your taste buds because National Burrito Day is just around the corner! This delicious celebration falls on the first Thursday of April every year, making it a must-do for burrito enthusiasts everywhere. 

This year, Downtown Bellefontaine is excited to share with you that National Burrito Day lands on Thursday, April 4th, giving you the perfect excuse to indulge in the ultimate comfort food: the glorious burrito. Are you ready for it?

The Burrito: A Culinary Marvel

Let's dive into the world of burritos and uncover some fascinating facts about this beloved culinary creation. 

Did you know that the word "burrito" actually means "little donkey" in Spanish? The origin of this name is attributed to the way burritos were traditionally packed and wrapped, resembling the shape of a donkey's ear.

Burritos have a rich history dating back to the Mexican-American border region, where they gained popularity among farm workers in the early 20th century. These portable meals, stuffed with a delicious combination of ingredients, soon became a staple in Mexican cuisine and a beloved comfort food worldwide.

Fun Facts to Spice Things Up

  • The largest burrito ever made weighed a whopping 5,799 pounds and was created in Mexico in 2010. Now that's a burrito feast!
  • Burritos come in various styles, including classic bean and cheese, savory carne asada, flavorful chicken, and even vegetarian or vegan options filled with delicious plant-based ingredients.
  • In some parts of Mexico, burritos are enjoyed for breakfast, filled with scrambled eggs, cheese, and meats like chorizo or bacon. Talk about a hearty way to start the day!

Celebrate National Burrito Day at The Flying Pepper Cantina

As National Burrito Day approaches, there's no better place to celebrate than The Flying Pepper Cantina in Bellefontaine, Ohio. This vibrant Mexican restaurant is known for its authentic flavors, generous portions, and friendly atmosphere, making it the ultimate destination for burrito enthusiasts.

At The Flying Pepper, you can feast on their signature burrito, packed with your choice of mouthwatering fillings. Whether you're craving tender steak, zesty chicken, flavorful pork, or a delightful vegetarian medley, The Flying Pepper has you covered. Not to mention their delectable burrito bowls, offering the same delicious options in a bowl format for a customizable dining experience.

Join the Fiesta at The Flying Pepper Cantina

On National Burrito Day, The Flying Pepper Cantina invites you to join the fiesta and savor the flavors of their irresistible burritos and burrito bowls. Bring your appetite and your sense of adventure as you explore the tantalizing tastes of Mexican cuisine.

Don't miss out on this delicious celebration! Mark your calendar for Thursday, April 4th, and treat yourself to the best burritos in town! Remember, at The Flying Pepper, every bite is a taste of Mexico's culinary heritage, crafted with passion and served with a side of smiles. 

Of course, if you’re not a burrito fan, no worries! The Flying Pepper offers a wide variety of other mouthwatering treats. To view the restaurant’s full menu, click here. 

The Flying Pepper Cantina 

137 W Columbus Avenue 

Bellefontaine, OH 43311

937-210-5042

item.title: Join the Solar Eclipse Watch Party
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Get ready for an astronomical experience like no other as the Great North American Eclipse graces the skies on April 8th, 2024. To celebrate this celestial spectacle, Roundhouse Depot Brewing Company, Downtown Bellefontaine's pioneering brewery, invites you to join the Solar Eclipse Watch Party from April 5th to April 8th. This four-day extravaganza promises fun, excitement, and a lineup of special events that will leave you starry-eyed.

A Weekend of Cosmic Delights

At the Solar Eclipse Watch Party, prepare to embark on a cosmic journey filled with unique beer releases crafted especially for this event. 

From April 5th to April 8th, Roundhouse Depot Brewing Company will unveil new brews that capture the essence of the eclipse, adding a touch of magic to your tasting experience. Explore a galaxy of flavors as you sample these limited-edition beers, each one a testament to the creativity and innovation of the brewery's master brewers.

Food Truck Galore

Indulge your taste buds with a stellar lineup of food trucks that will be serving up delicious treats throughout the weekend. 

On April 6th from 3-8 pm, enjoy the flavors of Guelaguetza Mexican Street Food Truck, offering authentic and mouthwatering Mexican cuisine. Then, on April 7th from 12-4 pm, treat yourself to a feast from Flappers Fins and Fries, known for their delectable seafood creations. And don't miss out on the Open Day on April 8th from 11 am to 6 pm, where culinary delights await. 

From savory to sweet, these food trucks have something for every palate, ensuring that your eclipse viewing experience is as satisfying as it is celestial.

Eclipse Essentials

Roundhouse Depot Brewing Company has you covered for all your eclipse viewing needs. Limited quantities of Solar Eclipse viewing glasses will be available, allowing you to witness this phenomenon safely and in style. 

Plus, grab your piece of Eclipse memorabilia with limited edition Eclipse shirts available for purchase. These exclusive shirts are sure to become collector's items, so don't miss your chance to snag one and commemorate this extraordinary event. Please note that only a limited number of shirts will be available.

Family-Friendly Fun

Bring the whole family along for a day of arts and entertainment. Kids can unleash their creativity with art activities designed to spark imagination and excitement. While you enjoy the eclipse-themed brews and delicious food, your little ones can dive into a world of artistic exploration right at the Solar Eclipse Watch Party. 

Join the Cosmic Celebration

Mark your calendars and prepare for a weekend of cosmic celebration at Roundhouse Depot Brewing Company's Solar Eclipse Watch Party. Whether you're a beer enthusiast, a foodie looking for culinary delights, or a family seeking fun activities, this event has something for everyone. 

Don't miss out on this stellar opportunity to experience the Great North American Eclipse uniquely and memorably. Round up your friends and family, grab your eclipse glasses, and head to Roundhouse Depot Brewing Company for an unforgettable celebration under the stars.

For additional details, including an updated beer list, click here! 

Roundhouse Depot Brewing Company 

217 W Chillicothe Avenue 

Bellefontaine, OH 43311

540-323-1295

item.title: Get Ready to Glow at The Syndicate’s Silent Disco!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Are you ready to experience an electrifying night of music, dancing, and glowing fun? Get ready to glow at The Syndicate's Silent Disco Night, hosted right in the heart of Downtown Bellefontaine, Ohio! This exciting event is not just your ordinary night out—it's a vibrant celebration that combines the thrill of disco with the unique twist of silent headphone parties.

Join us after the downtown festivities on Sunday, April 7th, from 6 to 10 PM, for an unforgettable glow party and silent disco experience like no other. The best part? There's no cover charge! That's right, this event is completely free for you to enjoy. Bring your friends, family, and dancing shoes for a night of non-stop entertainment.

Here's what you can look forward to at our Silent Disco Night:

Silent Disco Sensation

Never heard of a silent disco before? Prepare to be amazed! Instead of traditional loudspeakers, each partygoer receives a set of wireless headphones that tune into multiple channels of music. You can switch between channels to groove to your favorite beats, creating a personalized dance party experience. It's like having your DJ in your head!

Glow-Tastic Atmosphere

Get your glow on with our dazzling array of glow sticks and accessories. From neon bracelets to glowing headbands, you'll light up the night as you dance under the stars. The Syndicate will transform into a neon wonderland, creating a mesmerizing atmosphere that's perfect for capturing unforgettable memories.

Headset Hustle

We've got you covered with 125 headsets available on a first-come, first-served basis. Grab yours early to ensure you don't miss a beat of the action! Our silent disco experts will be on hand to guide you through the headset setup, so you can focus on dancing the night away.

Snack and Sip Delights

Dancing up an appetite? We've curated a special snack and drink menu to keep you fueled and refreshed throughout the night. Indulge in delicious bites and sip on flavorful drinks as you take in the vibrant energy of the silent disco.

The Syndicate Experience

Located in downtown Bellefontaine, The Syndicate is more than just a venue—it's a hub of entertainment, dining, and community spirit. With its chic ambiance, welcoming atmosphere, and top-notch service, The Syndicate is the perfect setting for a night of celebration and fun.

Silent Disco Trivia

Did you know that silent discos originated in the early 1990s as a way to bypass noise ordinances in urban areas? Today, they've evolved into a global phenomenon, bringing people together for unique music experiences. Silent discos are also eco-friendly, as they reduce noise pollution while still allowing for a lively party atmosphere.

Don't miss out on the glow-tastic fun at The Syndicate's Silent Disco Night! Mark your calendars, gather your crew, and get ready to dance under the neon lights. Whether you're a silent disco pro or trying it for the first time, this event promises an evening of laughter, music, and unforgettable moments.

Ready to glow? Watch this video to see what silent discos are all about: Silent Disco Video. We can't wait to see you light up the dance floor at The Syndicate!

Silent Disco Glow Party 

The Syndicate 

213 S. Main Street 

Bellefontaine, OH 43311

Sunday, April 7th 

6 to 10 PM

item.title: Experience the Cosmic Spectacle: Moon Glow over Main Street in Downtown Bellefontaine!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Get ready for an out-of-this-world experience right here in Downtown Bellefontaine! The Downtown Bellefontaine Partnership is thrilled to present "Moon Glow over Main Street," an electrifying total solar eclipse extravaganza taking place from April 6th to April 8th.

Picture this: the sun, the moon, and a spectacle of cosmic proportions. Downtown Bellefontaine sits directly in the path of totality, making it the prime spot to witness the breathtaking phenomenon of a Total Solar Eclipse. It's a celestial show you won't want to miss!

The weekend kicks off with a bang as the streets come alive with a fusion of sights, sounds, and flavors. Throughout the weekend, indulge your taste buds with delectable treats from food trucks, sip on refreshing beverages at the beer garden, and immerse yourself in the vibrant ambiance of Downtown Bellefontaine with DORA (Designated Outdoor Refreshment Area). But that's just the beginning!

Prepare for an action-packed itinerary that includes live music pulsating through the air and beats that'll keep you grooving all day and night. The DJ's mixes will set the tone for a lively atmosphere, perfect for soaking in the festival vibes.

If you're feeling competitive, join in on the fun with friendly contests like the cornhole tournament, where you can showcase your tossing skills. And who can resist the temptation of the Moon Pie Eating Contest? Dive into the delicious madness and see if you have what it takes to be crowned champion.

The excitement continues with engaging activities for all ages in STEAM Alley. Kids can embark on thrilling adventures with their passports, exploring interactive stations that blend science, technology, engineering, arts, and mathematics into a whirlwind of fun and learning.

For those seeking retail therapy, downtown businesses offer exclusive discounts through coupon books, ensuring you snag fantastic deals while supporting local shops. And let's not forget the merchandise tent, where you can discover unique treasures and souvenirs to commemorate your eclipse experience.

As the sun sets, get ready to illuminate the night at The Syndicate's glow party! The Syndicate, known for its classy ambiance and vibrant entertainment, will host a glow-themed extravaganza that promises to be the highlight of the weekend. With glowing decor, special snacks, and a dazzling array of beverages, it's the perfect way to cap off an unforgettable event.

But the excitement doesn't end there. On Monday, the grand finale awaits as the Total Solar Eclipse makes its celestial debut around 2:30 pm in Downtown Bellefontaine. Gather with friends and family to witness this rare spectacle, a moment that will be etched in your memory forever.

Throughout "Moon Glow over Main Street," delicious offerings from food trucks will keep you fueled, refreshing drinks will quench your thirst, and the vibrant energy of Downtown Bellefontaine will keep you captivated.

Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime celestial celebration! Join us for "Moon Glow over Main Street" and immerse yourself in a weekend of cosmic wonders, music, games, and unforgettable memories. It's a stellar event that promises to be out of this world!

For a complete, detailed schedule of events, or to purchase ticket bundles, click here!

item.title: Pineapple Palooza: The Event of the Year in Downtown Bellefontaine!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Get ready for an adventure right in the heart of Bellefontaine, Ohio! On Friday, June 7th, from 4 PM to midnight, Historic Downtown Bellefontaine will transform into a paradise of fun, music, and, of course, pineapples for Pineapple Palooza.

Proudly sponsored by Four Acre Clothing's family of companies, this signature event promises an unforgettable experience for all ages.

Why Pineapples?

Why pineapples, you ask? The pineapple has long been a symbol of hospitality, warmth, and welcome. What better way to represent our vibrant community than with this tropical fruit topping our beloved downtown fountain? Pineapple Palooza is all about celebrating our town's spirit and bringing people together for a fantastic time.

What's in Store?

This year's Pineapple Palooza is set to be bigger and better than ever, with a lineup of attractions and activities that will keep you entertained from start to finish.

Dance the Night Away

Feel the beat with our live DJ spinning the hottest tracks. Whether you're a seasoned dancer or just looking to have some fun, the music will get you moving and grooving all evening long.

Zipline Adventure

For the thrill-seekers, we've got an exhilarating zipline set up right on Main Street! Soar through the air and enjoy a bird's-eye view of the festivities below. It's an adventure you won't want to miss.

Food Truck Frenzy

Bring your appetite because we've assembled a variety of food trucks offering delicious eats to satisfy every craving. From savory to sweet, there's something for everyone. Grab a bite and enjoy the flavors of Pineapple Palooza.

Live Performances and Main Stage Concert

As the sun sets, the main stage comes alive with live performances leading up to a grand concert to cap off the night. Enjoy a mix of local talent and headlining acts that will keep the energy high and the crowd cheering.

Pineapple-Themed Contests and Prizes

Get in the spirit with our fun and quirky pineapple-themed contests. Test your skills and creativity for a chance to win exciting prizes. Whether it's a pineapple eating contest or the best pineapple costume, there's plenty of fun to be had.

Custom T-Shirt Printing

Take home a piece of Pineapple Palooza with a custom t-shirt printed live on-site. Choose your design, watch it come to life, and wear it as a memento of this incredible event.

Save the Date!

Mark your calendars for Friday, June 7th, and gather your friends and family for an evening of fun and festivity. Pineapple Palooza is the perfect way to kick off the summer, enjoy the community, and make lasting memories.

Date and Time:
Friday, June 7th, 4:00 PM – Midnight

Location:
Historic Downtown Bellefontaine
100 S Main Street, Bellefontaine, OH 43311

Tickets:
Available from $15 to $100
Get your tickets here!

Hosted By:
First Fridays Bellefontaine, Hi-Point Graphics, LLC, and Four Acre Clothing Co.

Join the Fun!

Pineapple Palooza is an event for everyone. Whether you're a local or visiting Bellefontaine, this is the place to be. Dance, eat, compete, and celebrate with us in the heart of our charming downtown. Stay tuned for more details and updates as the event approaches.

Get ready to dive into a world of pineapples, fun, and excitement at Pineapple Palooza. See you there!

item.title: Discover the Wonders of Ohio Caverns: America’s Most Colorful Caverns
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Nestled just a short drive from Downtown Bellefontaine, Ohio, lies a hidden gem that promises to captivate visitors with its underground beauty and vibrant hues.

 The Ohio Caverns in West Liberty, Ohio, are often celebrated as "America’s most colorful caverns," and for good reason. Whether you’re a local looking for a weekend adventure or a tourist eager to explore, the Ohio Caverns offer a magical journey beneath the earth's surface.

A Journey Through Time and Beauty

The story of the Ohio Caverns begins millions of years ago when ancient waters carved out the intricate passageways that we can explore today. Spanning approximately one mile of surveyed passages, these caverns reach depths of 30 to 103 feet, revealing stunning formations that are both awe-inspiring and educational.

Summer Splendor

In the summer months, the caverns offer two distinct tours: the Natural Wonder Tour and the Historic Tour. Each tour provides a unique glimpse into different parts of the caverns, ensuring that every visit offers something new and exciting.

The Natural Wonder Tour, which begins through a sinkhole entrance opened in 2012, guides visitors through areas discovered in the 1920s. Along the way, knowledgeable guides share insights into the geology and history of the caverns, highlighting the diverse formations that adorn the walls and ceilings.

The Historic Tour, on the other hand, takes visitors back in time to the original parts of the caverns seen by early explorers between 1897 and 1925. Beginning with a shuttle ride to the original entrance, guests descend 44 steps into the heart of the caverns, where they learn about the discovery and development of this natural wonder.

Winter Wonderland

When the chill of winter sets in, the Ohio Caverns continue to welcome visitors with a special Winter Tour. This tour combines highlights from both the Natural Wonder and Historic Tours, plus an exclusive section not seen during the summer.

With a constant temperature of 54 degrees year-round, the caverns provide a cozy and comfortable escape from the winter cold, making it a perfect destination for an off-season adventure.

A Visitor's Paradise

Beyond the captivating underground tours, Ohio Caverns offers a range of amenities to enhance your visit. Above the caverns lies a beautifully maintained 35-acre park, complete with playgrounds, picnic shelters, and EV charging stations. It’s an ideal spot for families to relax and enjoy a picnic after a day of exploration.

The Visitor’s Center houses a rock and gift shop where you can find unique souvenirs, clothing, and an array of rocks and minerals. For those interested in a bit of hands-on fun, the Gem Mining Sluice allows visitors to pan for gemstones, minerals, fossils, and even arrowheads. This activity is entertaining and educational, making it a hit with visitors of all ages.

Planning Your Visit

The Ohio Caverns are an all-weather attraction, open year-round with varying hours depending on the season. During the summer (May 1 - September 30), the caverns are open from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m., while in the winter (October 1 - April 30), they operate from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. Tours are guided, last about an hour, and start frequently throughout the day, especially during the busy season.

Reservations are generally not required except for groups of 20 or more and for the Limestone Tour, which is designed for visitors with limited mobility. However, purchasing tickets online can help you avoid long wait times, especially during peak periods.

A Short Drive from Downtown Bellefontaine

One of the best aspects of the Ohio Caverns is their proximity to Downtown Bellefontaine, making it an easy and convenient day trip. Just a short drive away, you can leave the hustle and bustle of city life behind and immerse yourself in the tranquility and splendor of this underground wonder.

Further, the Ohio Caverns offer an enchanting escape into a world of natural beauty and geological marvels. Whether you’re a seasoned spelunker or a curious first-timer, the caverns promise an unforgettable experience filled with color, history, and wonder. So, why wait? Plan your visit to the Ohio Caverns today and discover the hidden treasures that lie beneath the surface of West Liberty, Ohio.

item.title: Celebrate Independence Day with Parrots of the Caribbean:A Salute to Jimmy Buffett!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Get ready to dive into the ultimate Fourth of July extravaganza with Parrots of the Caribbean, the premier Jimmy Buffett tribute band in the nation! 

The band is all set to regale you with some timeless hits of Buffett & Friends, alongside their own unique Cajun-infused, country-rock melodies, promising a night of musical enchantment, laughter, and indelible memories at Holland Theatre!

A Musical Odyssey

Prepare to embark on a musical odyssey brimming with the iconic sounds that have defined Jimmy Buffett's illustrious career. From the sun-soaked melodies of "Cheeseburger in Paradise" to the breezy rhythms of "Changes in Latitudes, Changes in Attitudes," Parrots of the Caribbean will transport you to an idyllic island paradise, right here in Downtown Bellefontaine.

Immerse Yourself in the Experience

Unfortunately, Jimmy Buffett sadly passed away on September 1, 2023, in Sag Harbor, New York, but his legacy continues to resonate through his music. His spirit lives on in every note of his songs, bringing joy, relaxation, and a sense of adventure to fans around the world.

And that spirit is exactly what Parrots of the Caribbean offers! 

Immerse yourself in the captivating allure as the stage pulsates with the vibrant energy and infectious enthusiasm of Parrots of the Caribbean. Their performances are not just concerts; they're immersive experiences that capture the very essence of Jimmy Buffett's live shows, replete with lively interactions, captivating storytelling, and a genuine celebration of the carefree island lifestyle.

Get tickets now! 

Fun Facts About Jimmy Buffett

Did you know that Jimmy Buffett's love for the sea and sailing inspired many of his iconic songs? His passion for maritime adventures is reflected in classics like "A Pirate Looks at Forty" and "Son of a Son of a Sailor."

In addition to his musical prowess, Jimmy Buffett was a prolific writer. He's authored a collection of best-selling books, including novels, memoirs, and children's books, each infused with his signature wit, charm, and penchant for storytelling.

Beyond the stage and page, Jimmy Buffett was a visionary entrepreneur. He was the creative force behind the Margaritaville empire, encompassing restaurants, resorts, merchandise, and even a Margaritaville-themed retirement community!

Did you know that Jimmy Buffett was also an accomplished pilot? He first started flying planes in the 1980s and even owned a seaplane, which he affectionately named the Hemisphere Dancer.

Join the Festivities

This Fourth of July, elevate your celebrations with the ultimate tropical soirée featuring Parrots of the Caribbean. It's not just a concert; it's a jubilant homage to the laid-back ethos, infectious melodies, and enduring legacy of Jimmy Buffett. 

Gather your friends, bring your dancing shoes, and prepare for an evening of unforgettable music and merriment in the heart of Downtown Bellefontaine at Holland Theatre.

To secure your tickets, click here! Prepare to be swept away by the rhythm, revelry, and radiant spirit of Parrots of the Caribbean's salute to the one and only Jimmy Buffett!

item.title: Unleash the Fun at The Syndicate's Dueling Pianos Summer Show!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Get ready for an unforgettable evening of music, laughter, and culinary delights at The Syndicate's Dueling Pianos Summer Show! Mark your calendars for Wednesday, July 17, 2024, because this is an event you won’t want to miss. 

Located in the heart of Downtown Bellefontaine, The Syndicate is pulling out all the stops to bring you a night of top-tier entertainment and delectable dining. 

Let’s dive into what makes this summer show a must-attend event!

What to Expect

The Dueling Pianos Summer Show promises a lively and interactive musical experience that will have you singing, clapping, and laughing along. The dynamic duo, known as the Class Acts, will be taking the stage in the Syndicate’s beautiful beer garden. These talented musicians are masters at engaging the audience and creating a vibrant atmosphere. Whether you're a fan of classic rock, pop hits, or country tunes, they'll play your favorite songs and take your requests, ensuring a personalized and memorable show.

A Culinary Delight

The fun doesn’t stop with the music. The Syndicate’s full dinner menu will be available throughout the evening, featuring a range of mouth-watering options to satisfy every palate. 

In addition to regular offerings, the chef will craft special features and cocktails exclusively for this event. Imagine indulging in a gourmet meal while enjoying the electrifying performance—it's the perfect pairing for a perfect night.

Event Details

  • Date: Wednesday, July 17, 2024
    Time: Doors open at 5:00 PM, Show starts at 6:00 PM
    Location: The Syndicate, Bellefontaine
    Tickets: $20 per guest (Admission only)

Reservations are essential due to high demand and limited seating. Secure your spot by choosing from one of our available seating times:

  • 5:00 PM
  • 5:15 PM
  • 5:30 PM
  • 5:45 PM
  • 6:00 PM

Important Information

To make the night enjoyable for everyone, please note the following: 

  • Reservations not canceled more than 24 hours in advance will incur a $20 fee per guest.
  • Parties of 4 guests or less may be combined with additional parties.
  • In case of inclement weather, the performance will move to the dining room.
  • For special seating accommodations, call 937-210-5165.

How to Buy Tickets

Getting your tickets is easy! Just click here to reserve your spot. With each ticket priced at $20 per guest, you’ll gain admission to the show, but remember to come hungry because you’ll want to dive into the dinner menu and chef’s specials!

Why You Should Attend

The Syndicate's Dueling Pianos Summer Show is not just an event; it's an experience. Here are a few reasons why you should grab your tickets now:

  • Unmatched Entertainment: The Class Acts are renowned for their high-energy performances and audience engagement. They’ll have you dancing, singing, and maybe even on stage!
  • Delicious Dining: Enjoy a culinary journey with a full menu and exclusive chef features. Pair your meal with a signature cocktail for the ultimate dining experience.
  • Perfect Ambiance: The beer garden provides the perfect backdrop for a summer evening filled with music and fun. If the weather doesn’t cooperate, the cozy dining room will keep the vibe alive.
  • Great Company: Whether you’re coming with a date, a group of friends, or your entire family, the Dueling Pianos Summer Show is an event that everyone will enjoy.

Don’t Miss Out!

Summer is the season for making memories, and The Syndicate's Dueling Pianos Summer Show is the perfect way to create a night you’ll remember for years to come. Tickets are selling fast, so don’t wait—reserve your spot today and get ready for an evening of fantastic food, incredible music, and endless fun.

Join us at The Syndicate on July 17th for a night that hits all the right notes! We can’t wait to see you there!

item.title: Experience the Magic of Bob Dylan at The Syndicate: A Special Dinner + Show Event
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Downtown Bellefontaine, get ready for an unforgettable night of music and dining! On Wednesday, July 24, 2024, The Syndicate invites you to a special evening featuring the Chrome Horse: The Bob Dylan Tribute. From 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM, immerse yourself in the timeless music of Bob Dylan while enjoying a delicious dinner and cocktails. This is an event you won’t want to miss!

A Tribute to a Legend

Drew Gabbert, a veteran musician from Texas, will be gracing The Syndicate stage with his remarkable Bob Dylan tribute. Gabbert has a unique talent for capturing the essence of Dylan’s music, bringing to life a repertoire that spans six decades. His performance is not just a tribute; it’s an experience that honors the many voices and styles of Bob Dylan with incredible accuracy and reverence.

Gabbert’s dedication to authenticity shines through as he deliberately avoids modern technology and electronics, ensuring that the musical presentation remains as true to the original as possible. Visually and musically, Gabbert’s tribute is both striking and unmatched, offering a captivating experience for all Dylan fans.

Dinner and a Show

What could be better than enjoying a live Bob Dylan tribute performance? Pairing it with a full dinner and cocktail service, of course! The Syndicate will be offering a special Wednesday dinner service during the event, so you can savor delicious food and drinks while soaking in the sounds of Bob Dylan classics.

Event Details

  • Date: Wednesday, July 24, 2024
  • Time: 6:00 PM - 9:00 PM
  • Location: The Syndicate, Bellefontaine

The show will be hosted in The Syndicate’s beer garden on their Syndicate stage. In the event of inclement weather, the performance will be moved inside to ensure that the evening continues without interruption.

Important Information

  • No Cover Charge: There is no cover charge to attend this event, making it accessible for everyone to enjoy.
  • No Age Requirement: This event is open to guests of all ages, so bring your friends and family for a memorable night out.
  • Reservations: Due to high demand and limited seating, reservations are highly recommended. Parties with four guests or fewer may be combined with additional parties. For special seating accommodations, please call 937-210-5165.
  • Cancellation Policy: To accommodate as many guests as possible, any reservation not canceled more than 24 hours in advance will incur a $20 fee per guest.

About Drew Gabbert

Drew Gabbert is a Texas-based musician known for his exceptional ability to channel Bob Dylan’s spirit through his music. With a career spanning decades, Gabbert has become a master of his craft, delivering performances that resonate deeply with Dylan fans. His dedication to preserving the authenticity of Dylan’s music is evident in every note he plays, making each performance a tribute to the legend himself.

Make Your Reservation Today!

Don’t miss out on this extraordinary evening of music, food, and fun. Join us at The Syndicate on Wednesday, July 24, for Chrome Horse: The Bob Dylan Tribute. It’s the perfect midweek treat to enjoy with friends, family, or even a date night.

Secure your spot now by making a reservation. Simply visit our reservation page or call 937-210-5165 for special seating accommodations. Remember, due to high demand, reservations are essential, and we want to ensure that everyone has a chance to experience this special event.

item.title: Get Ready for the First Annual Downtown Bellefontaine Toss ‘n Tour!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Exciting news, Bellefontaine! Mark your calendars for Saturday, August 24, from 2-5 PM, and get ready for an unforgettable day of fun, laughter, and community spirit at our first annual Downtown Bellefontaine Toss ‘n Tour!

What is the Toss ‘n Tour?

Imagine cornhole with a twist—traveling from business to business in our charming downtown, each stop featuring a unique cornhole challenge. This isn't your typical backyard game; each business will have its own special take on the classic cornhole setup, ensuring that no two holes are the same. It's a fun, engaging way to explore our vibrant downtown area, enjoy some friendly competition, and support our local businesses.

Event Details

  • Date: Saturday, August 24
  • Time: 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM
  • Location: Historic Downtown Bellefontaine, 100 S Main Street, Bellefontaine, OH 43311
  • Team Registration Fee: $40 per four-person team
  • Refund Policy: Refunds are available up to 7 days before the event (Eventbrite's fee is nonrefundable)

Why You Should Join

The Toss ‘n Tour is more than just a game; it's an experience! Here's what you can look forward to:

Prizes and Recognition

  • Top Three Scores: Compete to be among the top three teams and win exciting prizes.
  • Best Team Name: Get creative and create a fun, catchy team name. The most inventive name wins a prize!
  • Best Dressed Team: Dress to impress! Whether it's matching outfits, themed costumes, or just something eye-catching, the best-dressed team will be rewarded.

Explore Downtown Bellefontaine

This event is a fantastic way to discover what Downtown Bellefontaine offers. As you move from one cornhole challenge to the next, you'll have the chance to explore our local shops and businesses. Many will offer exclusive drink discounts and store specials just for Toss ‘n Tour participants. It’s the perfect opportunity to enjoy some great deals while having a blast with your friends and family.

Drink and Enjoy

While you’re on the move, take advantage of the DORA (Designated Outdoor Refreshment Area) policy. Grab a drink from one of our participating establishments and carry it with you as you tour the cornhole stops. It’s a refreshing way to stay hydrated and keep your energy high as you compete.

How to Participate

Forming your team is easy! Here’s what you need to do:

  1. Gather Your Team: Find three friends or family members to join you in this exciting event. Remember, a team consists of four people.
  2. Register: Sign up your team for just $40. This fee covers all the fun and competition for the day.
  3. Get Creative: Come up with a fantastic team name and decide on your team’s outfit. The more unique, the better your chances of winning a prize!
  4. Show Up Ready to Play: On August 24, head to Historic Downtown Bellefontaine ready to compete, explore, and have a great time.

Sign Up Now and Join the Fun!

The Downtown Bellefontaine Toss ‘n Tour promises to be one of our most popular events of the summer. It’s a unique blend of fun, competition, and community spirit that you won’t want to miss. Whether you’re a cornhole pro or just looking for a fun way to spend a Saturday afternoon, this event is perfect for you.

So, what are you waiting for? Gather your team, register today, and get ready for an afternoon of fun, laughter, and friendly competition.

item.title: Celebrate National Vanilla Ice Cream Day in Downtown Bellefontaine!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Tuesday, July 23rd, is a day of sweet indulgence as we celebrate National Vanilla Ice Cream Day! In Downtown Bellefontaine, we’re all about cherishing the simple joys of life, and what could be more delightful than a scoop of creamy vanilla ice cream? Whether you’re a vanilla purist or enjoy a twist of toppings, we’ve got the perfect spots for you to relish this classic treat.

The Charm of Vanilla Ice Cream

Vanilla ice cream might seem plain to some, but it’s anything but boring. This beloved flavor is a blank canvas for your imagination. From rich and creamy textures to the sweet, fragrant vanilla beans, it’s the perfect dessert to beat the summer heat. Plus, vanilla is versatile enough to pair with almost any topping or dessert. A scoop of vanilla ice cream can elevate your favorite pie, or cake, or simply be savored on its own.

Here are some fun facts you may not know about vanilla ice cream:

  • Oldest Flavor: Vanilla is considered the oldest and most popular ice cream flavor in the United States. It dates back to the early 18th century and was even enjoyed by American presidents like Thomas Jefferson.
  • Origin of Vanilla: Vanilla beans come from orchids of the genus Vanilla, primarily found in Mexico. However, most of the world’s vanilla is now produced in Madagascar.
  • Thomas Jefferson’s Recipe: Thomas Jefferson is credited with bringing the first vanilla ice cream recipe to the U.S. after encountering it in France. His handwritten recipe is preserved in the Library of Congress.
  • Most Popular Flavor: According to surveys, vanilla consistently ranks as the most popular ice cream flavor in the world, favored for its simplicity and versatility.

Now, on to the important part of the article… Where you can enjoy vanilla ice cream on July 23rd! 

City Sweets & Creamery

City Sweets & Creamery is a downtown gem that knows how to celebrate vanilla ice cream in style. This charming ice cream parlor offers a wide range of flavors, but their vanilla is truly exceptional. Made with high-quality ingredients and a whole lot of love, each scoop promises to take you on a nostalgic journey back to simpler times.

Whit’s Frozen Custard—The Custard Conundrum

Okay, we know what you’re thinking – “Custard? But it’s National Vanilla Ice Cream Day!” Well, we’re bending the rules just a bit because Whit’s Frozen Custard is too good to ignore. This beloved spot offers a vanilla frozen custard so creamy and delicious, it deserves a spot in our celebration.

Whit’s vanilla frozen custard is smoother and denser than regular ice cream, thanks to its higher egg yolk content. It’s like ice cream’s richer, creamier cousin. You can enjoy it in a cone, a cup, or as part of their signature sundaes and shakes. 

Other Sweet Spots in Downtown Bellefontaine

While City Sweets & Creamery and Whit’s Frozen Custard are top contenders, Downtown Bellefontaine has more to offer for ice cream lovers. Don’t miss out on these other fantastic places to get your vanilla fix:

  • Six Hundred Downtown: Known for their delicious pizzas, they also offer mouthwatering vanilla ice cream that pairs perfectly with their warm, gooey desserts.
  • The Flying Pepper Cantina: This might sound unconventional, but their fried ice cream featuring a crispy coating around a cold vanilla scoop is an adventure for your taste buds.

Join the Celebration!

National Vanilla Ice Cream Day is the perfect excuse to gather friends and family for a sweet treat in Downtown Bellefontaine. 

So, mark your calendars for Tuesday, July 23rd, and head downtown for a vanilla ice cream extravaganza. Let’s make this National Vanilla Ice Cream Day one to remember, full of laughter, sweetness, and of course, lots of vanilla ice cream!

item.title: Raise a Glass to National Tequila Day!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Mark your calendars, because Wednesday, July 24th, is National Tequila Day! It’s time to raise a glass and celebrate the vibrant and versatile spirit that has been enjoyed for centuries. Whether you prefer your tequila in a classic margarita, a smooth sipping experience, or a creative cocktail, Downtown Bellefontaine has some fantastic spots where you can join the festivities. 

Let’s dive into the fun and discover where to enjoy tequila in our charming town!

The Syndicate

The Syndicate is one of Downtown Bellefontaine’s most popular bars, known for its lively atmosphere and excellent drink menu. On National Tequila Day, this is the place to be for tequila enthusiasts.
